description_long: This is a compact, three-tiered shelving unit constructed primarily from wood, featuring a minimalist and open-frame design. The vertical supports are slender and rectangular, with two horizontal shelves and a deeper bottom shelf, all supported by visible metal brackets. The shelves are flat and unadorned, providing ample space for storing or displaying items. The legs are short and sturdy, with the bottom shelf elevated slightly above the ground. The overall finish is natural wood, with metal accents providing structural support and a modern touch. This piece is suitable for use in urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or public parks for organizing or displaying objects.
description: A minimalist, three-tiered wooden shelving unit with metal supports and open sides, ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three shelves, vertical supports, and metal brackets.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thinness of the shelves and the open, bracket-supported structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shelves and the full height of the vertical supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the open, bracketed design and shelf depth.
